title: Fools Highway
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, Emil Forst, Harvey Gates
actors: Mary Philbin, Pat O'Malley, William Collier Jr.
plot: Mike Kildare, a swaggering youth from New York City's Bowery at the turn of the century, comes to the defense of Mamie Rose, a mender in a secondhand clothing shop, when his own gang of Irish-Americans insult her. Mamie is fascina...
